title: {{id}}-{{title}}{{mode}}
template:
---
title: "<%= title %>"
aliases: ["<%= title %>"]
type: SimpRead
tags:
<% tags.forEach(function(tag){ %>- <%= tag_prefix + tag + tag_suffix %>
<% }); %>---

> [!summary] Metadata
> - **URL**: [<%= title %>](<%= url %>)
> - **Date**: <%= date %>

<%= body %>
